name: addTab
description: Adds a new tab to a Google Docs document. Optionally set the tab title, position, parent tab (for nesting), and icon emoji. Returns the new tab's ID and properties.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

title.description: The title for the new tab. If not specified, Google Docs assigns a default name.

parentTabId.description: The ID of an existing tab to nest this new tab under as a child. Use listDocumentTabs to get tab IDs. If not specified, the tab is created at the root level.

index.description: The zero-based position among sibling tabs (within the same parent). If not specified, the tab is added at the end.

iconEmoji.description: An emoji to display as the tab icon (e.g., "📋").
